nasb.text: Oh give thanks to the Lord, call upon His name; Make known His deeds among the peoples.

esv.text: Oh give thanks to the Lord; call upon his name; make known his deeds among the peoples!

cnv.text: 你們要稱謝耶和華，求告他的名； 在萬民中傳揚他的作為。

ccb.text: 你们要称谢耶和华，呼求祂的名， 在列邦传扬祂的作为。

csbs.text: 你们当称谢耶和华，呼求他的名， 在万民中传扬他的作为；
